description: Bugfix cycle 6 for Milestone 6 — WebSocket & Real-Time. Fixes 1 minor defect: DEF-004 (Ruff lint gate check fails with 6 auto-fixable errors: unused imports and unsorted import blocks in WebSocket test files).

userStories.title: Fix: DEF-004 — Remove unused imports and sort import blocks in WebSocket test files
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-004 from QA report qa-m6-websocket.md. The Ruff lint gate check (required) fails with 6 errors: 4 unused imports (F401) and 2 unsorted import blocks (I001) across 3 WebSocket test files.
acceptanceCriteria: ruff check services/ exits with 0 errors
All 156 tests still pass when run via: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm python-tests pytest
userStories.notes:
Defect: DEF-004. Severity: Minor.

The following 6 Ruff errors must be fixed:

1. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_access.py:14 — F401: Remove unused import `IdeaConsumer` from `from apps.websocket.consumers import IdeaConsumer`
2. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_access.py:47 — I001: Sort the inline import block `from apps.ideas.models import Idea as _Idea, IdeaCollaborator as _IC`
3. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_consumers.py:9-20 — I001: Sort the import block (ruff will fix ordering)
4. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_consumers.py:11 — F401: Remove unused `AsyncMock` from `from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch`
5. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_middleware.py:8 — F401: Remove unused `override_settings` from `from django.test import TestCase, override_settings`
6. services/gateway/apps/websocket/tests/test_middleware.py:11 — F401: Remove unused `WebSocketAuthMiddleware` from `from apps.websocket.middleware import WebSocketAuthMiddleware`

Fix approach: Run `ruff check services/ --fix` to auto-fix all 6 errors. Alternatively, make the 6 manual edits listed above.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT modify any application code (consumers.py, middleware.py, conftest.py). Only test files need lint fixes.
IMPORTANT: After fixing, verify all tests still pass: `docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm python-tests pytest`

bugfixHistory.guidanceNote:
⚠ INFRASTRUCTURE FAILURE — This is NOT an application code issue. The errors stem from test framework configuration.

Root cause pattern (DB_LIFECYCLE): The test database is being dropped or not created between test classes. Check conftest.py for database_sync_to_async, TransactionTestCase usage, and pytest-django settings. Ensure each test class gets a fresh or properly persisted database.

FOCUS ON: conftest.py, test settings, docker-compose files, fixture loading order.
DO NOT: Modify application code, test assertions, or business logic.

── PREVIOUS CYCLE ANALYSIS ──

This is bugfix attempt #4. 3 previous attempt(s) FAILED.

Cycle 0: TEST_INFRASTRUCTURE/DB_FIXTURE_COLLISION (passed=131, failed=0, errors=11)
  Evidence: E               psycopg2.errors.UniqueViolation: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "aut
Cycle 1: APPLICATION/TEST_ASSERTION (passed=134, failed=8, errors=0)
  Evidence: AssertionError
Cycle 0: TEST_INFRASTRUCTURE/DB_LIFECYCLE (passed=156, failed=0, errors=0)
  Evidence: /app:0: PytestWarning: Error when trying to teardown test databases: ProgrammingError('database "ziq

DO NOT repeat approaches from previous cycles. If a strategy was tried and failed, try something different.
